prompt: Add a new CLI command 'harness validate' to the project. This command should call scripts/validate.py and return its exit code. The command should be registered in the main CLI entry point. This affects multiple files (new command file + CLI registration + potential config changes).

assertions.name: classifies_as_medium
assertions.description: Correctly identifies task as Medium complexity

assertions.name: seeks_human_approval
assertions.description: Waits for human approval before executing

assertions.name: delegates_to_subagent
assertions.description: Delegates execution to sub-agent (not direct execution)

assertions.name: runs_full_validation
assertions.description: Runs full validation pipeline (build → lint → test → verify)

assertions.name: git_commit
assertions.description: Commits changes with proper message format
